props.message:
Chiseled into the brick of the cooled smelter:

"This pit was the first. Brann the Elder lit the first fire. Brann the Younger banked the last. Stand a moment. The Forge predates Khorgaul."

props.open_message: A leather pouch of slag-pebbles, twenty in all. Sling-stones, weighed and warm. The Strikers leave them for any traveler who wandered down.

load_zones.prompt: [E] Up out of the smelter pit
